record: A3 truth-cube provider for exp/feedback-latent Stage-1 ([F-02] §5 R28 rung R2)
deliverable: FeedbackCubeProvider: coord->x sampler + whole-region accessor over the 4 rho truth cubes (P1..P4) at 192^3, z=0.3, [D-49] spatial split, SIREN [-1,1] coords.

cubes.note: All 4 cubes were extracted-present on disk this session (ls -la confirmed, 56623232 bytes each). Consistent with f01c_cube_enumeration.json. Provider degrades gracefully (missing_variants list, strict=False default) if a cube is absent; verified by test_missing_path_graceful_and_strict.
cubes.content: rho/<rho> real-space overdensity (already mean-normalized; passed straight to x_transform)

split_constants.source: src.data.loader.DEFAULT_SCHEME / HeldoutSplitScheme ([D-49]); voxel floor rule int(frac*n_grid) mirrored from loader.extract_rho_crops (loader.py:1143-1144). NOT re-derived: imported.

coordinates.convention: SIREN [-1,1]; cell center voxel i -> ((i+0.5)/192) in [0,1] -> 2u-1 in [-1,1]. Box scale cancels in normalization but carried explicitly (BOX_KPC_H) for the kpc/h round-trip and lineage.
coordinates.roundtrip_test: test_coord_roundtrip_siren_to_voxel: SIREN -> kpc/h -> floor(kpc/box*192) recovers integer voxel index exactly.
coordinates.autograd: coords returned as torch tensors; test_coords_autograd_capable confirms requires_grad_/backward path is finite. No detached-NumPy in the differentiable path.

api.sample(p, region, n, seed): -> (coords (n,3) SIREN float tensor, x_targets (n,) float tensor). Deterministic under seed. Random voxel-center samples within the region's axis-0 slab.
api.region_cube(p, region): -> (x_slab (na,192,192) float64, coords_siren (na,192,192,3) float64) whole-region accessor for scoring.

validate_data.note: Runs on every loaded cube at construction. floor log10(1e-3)=-3; P1 max overdensity ~4115 -> log10 ~ 3.61, within window.

coverage: split boundaries exact (0/134/163/192) + loader int-floor parity + contiguity
coord round-trip SIREN<->voxel + cell-center kpc/h endpoints
x-transform matches d75 reference <= 1e-12 + floor behavior
determinism under seed (equal for same seed, differ across seeds)
whole-region accessor shapes + alignment + region_flat parity

scope_notes: rho-only per Stage-1 spec ([F-02] §4). T/X_HI/v_pec heads deferred (cube enumeration f01c: MISSING-but-PRODUCIBLE). No compute, no Juno, no scoring run here — this is the data plumbing artifact only.
